task_completion.description: Enable the Packages feature in Odoo settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo Inventory Settings page with the 'Packages' checkbox enabled and saved.

task_completion.description: Configure the Small Shipping Box package type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a Package Type record created for 'Small Shipping Box' with Barcode 'PKGTYPE-SM', Size '30 x 25 x 20' (or similar dimension fields), and Max Weight '10'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Medium Shipping Box package type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a Package Type record created for 'Medium Shipping Box' with Barcode 'PKGTYPE-MD', Size '60 x 40 x 35', and Max Weight '25'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Large Shipping Crate package type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a Package Type record created for 'Large Shipping Crate' with Barcode 'PKGTYPE-LG', Size '120 x 80 x 60', and Max Weight '50'.

task_completion.description: Configure Product Packaging for Makita XFD131 18V LXT Drill Kit
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Product Packaging list or product form showing the Makita Drill Kit mapped to 'Single Drill Box' (Qty: 1, Small Shipping Box) and 'Drill 4-Pack' (Qty: 4, Medium Shipping Box).

task_completion.description: Configure Product Packaging for DeWalt DWE7491RS 10-Inch Table Saw
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Product Packaging list or product form showing the DeWalt Table Saw mapped to 'Table Saw Crate' (Qty: 1, Large Shipping Crate).

task_completion.description: Configure Product Packaging for Bosch GLL30 Self-Leveling Cross-Line Laser
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Product Packaging list or product form showing the Bosch Laser mapped to 'Laser 2-Pack' (Qty: 2, Small Shipping Box) and 'Laser Case' (Qty: 8, Medium Shipping Box).

task_completion.description: Configure Product Packaging for Irwin Marples M444 6-Piece Chisel Set
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Product Packaging list or product form showing the Irwin Chisel Set mapped to 'Chisel 3-Pack' (Qty: 3, Small Shipping Box) and 'Chisel Bulk Box' (Qty: 12, Medium Shipping Box).

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to configure settings and records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo application, not a terminal executing Python scripts or direct database queries to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actively filled out the forms for package types and product packaging.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into form fields, selecting dropdowns, and clicking save buttons, rather than just viewing pre-existing records.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or edit the expected result JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) are shown editing '/tmp/package_type_result.json' directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The programmatic verifier checks the exported Odoo state at '/tmp/package_type_result.json' and requires a score of at least 60 to pass. The VLM should verify that the agent visually configured the Packages feature, the 3 Package Types (Small, Medium, Large with correct dimensions/barcodes), and the 7 Product Packaging records mapping specific products to these package types with the correct quantities.
